summary: This metric follows the same pattern as the 7-day pest response rate: performance worsened through FY23, then improved sharply as NYCHA consolidated exterminators under one Pest Control Department and added daily supervisor reviews and cross-training, part of its effort to meet pest-response deadlines under its 2019 consent agreement with the federal Department of Housing and Urban Development.

sources.label: NYCHA, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
